# v0.1.20

This release fixes a high-impact coding workflow bug where a provider could answer a code-writing request by printing source code in chat instead of creating files.

## Added

- Runtime fallback that detects code-block-only responses for code-writing tasks and writes them into the workspace.
- Filename inference for code tasks without an explicit path, using safe `generated/` outputs.
- Regression tests for explicit file materialization and generated file materialization.

## Changed

- The agent action contract now explicitly requires `write_file`, `patch_file`, or `batch_patch` for code/script/app/file creation and modification tasks.
